context: Tests whether the agent designs a channel-agnostic catalog schema with the correct column types, constraints, and table structure, including UUID keys, integer pricing in cents, JSONB for dimensions, TIMESTAMPTZ for timestamps, the correct channel type enum check, and proper uniqueness constraints on channel_listings and orders.

checklist.name: UUID with gen_random_uuid()
checklist.description: Product (and other entity) primary keys use UUID type with DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()

checklist.name: master_sku unique
checklist.description: Products table has a master_sku column declared as NOT NULL UNIQUE (VARCHAR or TEXT)

checklist.name: Price stored in integer cents
checklist.description: Price in channel_listings (or equivalent) is stored as INTEGER, not DECIMAL/FLOAT/NUMERIC, with cents as the unit

checklist.name: JSONB dimensions
checklist.description: Product dimensions are stored in a JSONB column (not separate columns or TEXT)

checklist.name: TIMESTAMPTZ timestamps
checklist.description: All timestamp columns use TIMESTAMPTZ (not TIMESTAMP without timezone)

checklist.name: Channel type CHECK constraint
checklist.description: Channels table has a CHECK constraint limiting type to 'dtc', 'wholesale', 'marketplace', and 'pos'

checklist.name: Unique channel SKU per channel
checklist.description: channel_listings table has a UNIQUE constraint on (channel_id, channel_sku) combination

checklist.name: Single shared inventory pool
checklist.description: Inventory is stored in a single table with a shared reserved count (not split per channel), and notes.md or comments explain that reserved spans all channels

checklist.name: Non-negative inventory constraint
checklist.description: Inventory table has a CHECK constraint ensuring quantity_on_hand >= 0

checklist.name: Channel inventory allocations table
checklist.description: Schema includes a channel_inventory_allocations (or equivalent) table for optional per-channel buffers, with allocated_qty defaulting to 0

checklist.name: Unique channel order ID constraint
checklist.description: Orders table (if included) has a UNIQUE constraint on (channel_id, channel_order_id) to prevent duplicate imports
